testCases.testName: Form field 'Name' has value 'John Doe', run /fill-form with document containing 'John David Doe', verify suggestion appears
testCases.notes: Requires Playwright MCP for UI automation. Test requires frontend interaction with form fields, chat interface, and WebSocket messages. Implementation verified: backend/tools/form_parser.py contains compare_values() function, backend/api/chat.py handles form_suggestion messages, frontend FormViewer.tsx displays SuggestedValueInline component.

testCases.testName: Verify suggestion displays inline under field with check and X icons
testCases.notes: Requires Playwright MCP for UI validation. Test verifies SuggestedValueInline component renders correctly with Check and X icons. Implementation verified: src/components/workspace/FormViewer.tsx lines 21-71 define the inline suggestion component with accept/reject buttons.

testCases.testName: Click check icon, verify field value updates to suggested value and suggestion disappears
testCases.notes: Requires Playwright MCP for click interactions and state verification. Test verifies acceptSuggestion() handler updates field value and removes suggestion. Implementation verified: src/contexts/AppContext.tsx lines 148-176 define acceptSuggestion function with field update and suggestion removal logic.

testCases.testName: Click X icon, verify suggestion is dismissed without changing field value
testCases.notes: Requires Playwright MCP for click interactions and state verification. Test verifies rejectSuggestion() handler dismisses suggestion without field changes. Implementation verified: src/contexts/AppContext.tsx lines 179-202 define rejectSuggestion function with dismissal tracking.

testCases.testName: Multiple fields have suggestions, verify all display simultaneously without layout issues
testCases.notes: Requires Playwright MCP for UI layout validation. Test verifies multiple SuggestedValueInline components can render simultaneously. Implementation verified: FormViewer.tsx lines 204-211 map formSuggestions[field.id] for each field independently.

testCases.testName: Form field empty, run /fill-form, verify value fills directly without suggestion
testCases.notes: Requires Playwright MCP for form state verification. Test verifies empty fields receive direct_updates without suggestions. Implementation verified: backend/tools/form_parser.py lines 236-239 handle empty field case with direct_updates.

testCases.testName: Suggested value identical to current value, verify no suggestion displayed
testCases.notes: Requires Playwright MCP for UI state verification. Test verifies identical values are ignored. Implementation verified: backend/tools/form_parser.py lines 241-244 handle identical value case with ignored list.

testCases.testName: Verify confidence score displays as percentage (e.g., '85% confidence')
testCases.notes: Requires Playwright MCP for UI text content verification. Test verifies confidence display format. Implementation verified: FormViewer.tsx line 32 calculates confidencePercent, line 51-53 displays percentage format.

testCases.testName: Accept suggestion, verify chat message confirms 'Updated field Name with suggested value'
testCases.notes: Requires Playwright MCP for chat message verification. Test verifies acceptSuggestion() sends confirmation message. Implementation verified: AppContext.tsx lines 157-167 send chat message with field update confirmation.

testCases.testName: Run /fill-form twice on different documents, verify suggestions update correctly
testCases.notes: Requires Playwright MCP for multi-step interaction testing. Test verifies suggestions state updates correctly across multiple /fill-form commands. Implementation verified: AppContext.tsx lines 241-279 handle form_suggestion WebSocket messages with state replacement.

testCases.testName: Navigate away from form and back, verify dismissed suggestions remain dismissed
testCases.notes: Requires Playwright MCP for navigation and state persistence testing. Test verifies dismissedSuggestions Set persists across navigation. Implementation verified: AppContext.tsx line 110 defines dismissedSuggestions state, lines 191-195 and 250-254 filter dismissed suggestions.

testCases.testName: Field with low confidence suggestion (<50%), verify displayed with warning color (yellow)
testCases.notes: Requires Playwright MCP for CSS styling verification. Test verifies conditional color classes based on confidence threshold. Implementation verified: FormViewer.tsx lines 33-42 apply yellow colors for confidence < 0.5, blue colors for confidence >= 0.5.

keyFunctions: compare_values() - Lines 195-264: Categorizes extracted values into direct_updates, suggestions, and ignored based on current values
parse_extraction_result() - Lines 267-419: Accepts current_values parameter and calls compare_values() when provided
handle_form_extraction() - Lines 326-420: Accepts current_values parameter, sends form_suggestion WebSocket messages for non-empty fields
WebSocket handler - Lines 269-276: Extracts currentFormValues from message and passes to handle_form_extraction()

keyFeatures: formSuggestions state - Line 109: FormSuggestions state object
dismissedSuggestions state - Line 110: Set tracking dismissed suggestion IDs
acceptSuggestion() - Lines 148-176: Updates field value, removes suggestion, sends chat confirmation
rejectSuggestion() - Lines 179-202: Dismisses suggestion, adds to dismissedSuggestions Set, sends chat confirmation
WebSocket handler - Lines 241-279: Handles form_suggestion messages, filters dismissed suggestions
currentFormValues in messages - Lines 461-468: Sends current form values with every chat message

keyComponents: SuggestedValueInline component - Lines 21-71: Displays inline suggestion with confidence, Check/X buttons, color-coded by confidence threshold
Form field mapping - Lines 204-211: Maps formSuggestions to display under each field

notes: All 12 test cases for requirement S5-002 are UI-based Playwright tests requiring manual execution or Playwright MCP server. Playwright MCP is not currently available. Implementation has been verified through code analysis - all required backend and frontend changes are present and correctly implemented. Backend properly categorizes extracted values (empty fields → direct updates, non-empty differing fields → suggestions, identical fields → ignored). Frontend displays inline suggestions with confidence-based color coding, accept/reject actions, and state persistence for dismissed suggestions.
recommendations: Install and configure Playwright MCP server to enable automated UI test execution
Alternatively, execute tests manually following the test case descriptions
Verify WebSocket message flow using browser DevTools Network tab during manual testing
Test with various confidence scores (<50% and >=50%) to verify color coding
Test navigation scenarios to ensure dismissedSuggestions Set persists correctly
Consider adding Python backend unit tests for compare_values() function to validate categorization logic without UI dependency
